flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Minnesota-Twin Cities rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.8k → $38.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Minnesota-Twin Cities rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.3k → $17.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Minnesota-Twin Cities fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Minnesota-Twin Cities are 22% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($69.0k vs $56.4k).
